Exhibition Room

Hydrangeas

Great flowerheads of blue, pink, and white — the hydrangea studied across seasons and light, from garden borders to the deep, saturated color of dusk.

Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas

The Garden as Art

A digital archive of artistic heritage, dedicated to the philosophy of the garden, contemporary art, and the creation of a harmonious living space.
